untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of implied volatility to historical volatility by standard deviations and trend confirmation in both IV and HV. The allowed indicator set lacks: (1) explicit implied volatility metric separate from india_vix, (2) standard deviation calculation capability, (3) volatility trend indicators. Cannot express 'upward trend confirmed in both historical and implied volatility' using only provided indicators. Calendar spread structure (long near-term/short far-term) is also a position construction strategy not representable as entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated using india_vix as IV proxy and hvol_20 as HV proxy. Entry attempts to capture IV > HV condition. True signal requires option Greeks and volatility surface data unavailable in price-action indicators. Manual implementation of calendar spread leg sizing needed outside this rule engine.
